title: calamus scapigerus
intro: Calamus scapigerus, also known as Acorus scapigerus, is a type of plant belonging to the Acoraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamus scapigerus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Calamus scapigerus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
